title: AI Productivity OS: Build Your Personal Automation Stack in 14 Days
audience: Knowledge workers and solopreneurs comfortable with ChatGPT but who haven't built a system around it
outcome_statement: By the end, you can run your week through a personal AI stack that captures, plans, executes, and reviews on your behalf.
learner_journey: Module 1 grounds you in why most ChatGPT users plateau. Modules 2-5 build the four pillars (capture, plan, execute, automate). Module 6 wires them together into a daily review loop.

modules.title: Foundations: Why Most People Plateau
modules.stage_purpose: Frame the problem and the system mindset.
modules.capstone_exercise: Map your current workflow and identify the 3 biggest leakage points.

lessons.title: Why Your ChatGPT Routine Stopped Compounding
lessons.objective: Diagnose two reasons knowledge workers plateau when using ChatGPT alone.

lessons.title: Treat Your Tools Like an Operating System
lessons.objective: Apply the OS metaphor to evaluate any productivity tool.

modules.title: Capture: Inbox-Zero with AI Triage
modules.stage_purpose: Get every input out of your head and into a system.
modules.capstone_exercise: Build a daily AI triage routine for your inbox and read-later queue.

lessons.title: Map Your Capture Points
lessons.objective: Identify every channel that delivers actionable input to you.

lessons.title: Build an AI Triage Function
lessons.objective: Create a Claude-powered classifier that sorts incoming items.

modules.title: Execute: Drafting, Coding, Deciding
modules.stage_purpose: Turn AI from a chat partner into a daily co-pilot.
modules.capstone_exercise: Build three reusable execution prompts and run them daily for one week.

lessons.title: Five Prompt Patterns That Compound
lessons.objective: Apply five prompt patterns to your most-repeated work.

lessons.title: Use AI as a Decision Co-pilot
lessons.objective: Evaluate a real decision using a structured AI co-pilot prompt.
